scope_note: QA HeartMath Coherence Firewall Cert family [259]: enforces Theorem NT (observer-projection firewall) on HeartMath-sourced cardiac-rhythm data. Primary sources: Oschman & Oschman 2015 (J Vortex Sci Technol 2:121, DOI: 10.4172/2090-8369.1000121); Danielson et al 2014 (GAHM 3(Suppl 1):BPA05, DOI: 10.7453/gahmj.2014.BPA05); Edwards 2018 (J Psych Africa 28:5, DOI: 10.1080/14330237.2018.1528007); Tomasino 1997 (Institute of HeartMath Pub 97-002). Cardiac-rhythm coherence as measured in the HeartMath literature (ECG coherence, HRV LF/HF ratio, cross-coherence) is a CONTINUOUS observer-projection output of a DISCRETE orbit-class distinction on the mod-24 harmonic cycle. The cert certifies: rhythm states MUST be labeled as members of {Singularity, Satellite, Cosmos}; continuous coherence-ratio measurements enter ONLY as observer-projection outputs (direction=output), never as causal inputs to QA dynamics. Primary-source anchors: oschman_2015_master_oscillator (heart as master electrical oscillator broadcasting coherent frequencies -> Cosmos), oschman_2015_rein_coherence (ECG coherence under positive-emotion attention + heart-brain cross-coherence -> Satellite, entrained), oschman_2015_bidirectional_antenna (antenna reciprocity = two-boundary-crossing symmetry in Theorem NT), edwards_2018_coherence_patterns (population-scale coherence patterns). Fixture witnesses cite tools/qa_kg/fixtures/source_claims_heartmath.json claim IDs. Does NOT claim an HI <-> HRV coherence-ratio numerical mapping (requires McCraty/Radin primary-source data, Phase 4.8 item 6, deferred). Does NOT do HRV measurement or biofeedback; QA describes what the coherence phenomenon reduces to when observer-projection is declared properly. Primary source: Documents/heartmath_corpus/oschman_2015_heart_bidirectional_scalar_antenna.pdf. Excerpts: docs/theory/heartmath_phase4_8_excerpts.md. Theory: docs/theory/QA_HEARTMATH_COHERENCE.md.
